name: Krispy Bars with Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sugar and corn syrup until they reach a bubbling consistency.
2. Add the peanut butter and mix well.
3. Spread the mixture into a buttered pan.
4. Allow to cool slightly, then frost with the melted chocolate and butterscotch.
5. These bars are chewy but delicious. If you have a larger pan than 9 x 13, it works better as they aren't so thick.
